title: Snowy's Fireflies
description: Adds aggressive fireflies to the game. They may look harmless but once a frog is near for some reason it attacks them when they get in contact.
body:
This is a new mod I've made for YouTube.

It adds cursed fireflies into the game.
They spawn in the overworld.

No spawn eggs are made for the fireflies as they are extremely subtle.

They drop nothing but xp.
